name: restaurant-platform
description: Restaurant SaaS and local POS platform

scripts.build:pos:win:publish: npm run build:pos:win && npm run publish:pos:installers
scripts.build:pos:mac:publish: npm run build:pos:mac && npm run publish:pos:installers
scripts.build:pos:linux:publish: npm run build:pos:linux && npm run publish:pos:installers
scripts.setup:palmsy: npm --prefix saas-backend run migrate && node scripts/setup-palmsy.js
